name: Cloud Infrastructure
description: Infrastructure management pages: apps, deployments, teams, services, tokens, usage monitoring, status, and compliance

page_briefs.apps: Filter bar at top with search and status filters. Two-column layout below: wider left column shows a card grid of app resources with status badges, narrower right column has a live activity feed.
page_briefs.app-detail: Detail header with app name, status, and action buttons. KPI row showing request count, error rate, uptime. Below, two-column split: deploy log with live-updating entries on the left, data table of instances on the right.
page_briefs.team: Filter bar at top for search and role filters. Below, a card grid of team member cards showing avatar, name, role badge, and last-active timestamp.
page_briefs.activity: Filter bar with date range and event type filters. Below, a chronological activity feed with timestamped entries showing user, action, and resource affected.
page_briefs.services: Grid of service catalog cards showing service name, icon, status indicator, and region badge. Cards are clickable for drill-down.
page_briefs.tokens: Toolbar at top with create-token button and search. Below, a data table of API tokens with name, prefix, created date, last-used, and revoke action columns.
page_briefs.usage: Resource gauge grid at top showing CPU, memory, bandwidth, and storage with circular or bar gauges. Below, a chart grid with time-series graphs for each metric.
page_briefs.status: Status board with rows for each service showing name, current status dot (green/yellow/red), uptime percentage, and incident history sparkline.
page_briefs.compliance: Onboarding-style checklist card at top with completion progress bar and check items. Below, a data table of compliance requirements with status and evidence columns.

shells.sidebar-main: Left sidebar with grouped nav + main content area
